MANCHESTER <hide>th April <hide>: Gama, global provider business information and services specializing FMCG product innovation and international trade, has today officially opened entries for the upcoming edition the Gama Innovation Awards.
The Gama Innovation Awards recognise outstanding innovation the FMCG space across eight categories: Product, Packaging, Positioning, Branding Design, Health Wellness, SME, Best Britain and Best Middle East.
Winners will announced awards ceremony that will take place Manchester’s iconic Bridgewater Hall Thursday <hide>th October <hide>.
Gama can today also reveal its panel international judges who will tasked with choosing the winning entries from shortlist innovative products each category.
Representing some the leading FMCG firms across the globe, the exciting line-up judges includes thought leaders from companies such Kraft Heinz, Unilever, Carlsberg, Sonae and PepsiCo, underlining the Gama Innovation Awards’ growing reputation major showcase global innovation.
Cesar Pereira, founder CEO Gama, commented: “We are thrilled return this year with expanded edition the Gama Innovation Awards.
